title: What exactly was cut out of put into DeathTrue2 and quot
display_title: What exactly was cut out of put into DeathTrue2 and quot
wikitext:
[]: What exactly was cut out of/put into "Death(True)2&quot             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Mon Apr 06, 2009 6:17 pm Quick question probably answered somewhere else but looking for a quick answer: Wikipedia says this: "Death & Rebirth" (Rebirth being the first half of End of Eva) had "Death", a clip show of the series with Director's Cut material they knew they'd cut out and put into episodes 21 through 24. So the "new stuff" in "Death" is those scenes, and the redone "Rei smiling in episode 6" scene Then, "Death(true)" was a satellite TV version that just cut out ALL of the new stuff, utterly worthless It has this to say about the last version: The second edit was Death(true)², which reincorporated the image of Adam on Gendo Ikari's hand, and had several scenes taken out.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 07, 2009 7:38 am I guess this is better than the non-reply you're getting: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=209217#209217

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Tue Apr 07, 2009 8:00 am Yes, that's the cover. (But that URL looks hotlinked to me...) The cut of Gendo with Adam is hardly the only "director's cut"-type footage left in TRUE^2. More prominent examples include the camera footage from the UN Antarctic base and Fuyutsuki & Yui's chat at the Ashinoko levee, but you'll find the stuff scattered throughout. Going by the DEATH film book, what was cut out is an Asuka flashback/"mind rape" section between Kaji's death and Kaworu's appearance, including footage such as the monologue at the bathtub, Asuka shoving her boobs in Kaji's face, and "Who are you?" / "No! This isn't me!" scene. The only other difference I've been able to detect from the filmbook is that the shot of Misato flashed during Kensuke's chat with Shinji was redone for TRUE or TRUE^2. Yeah, I know, scans. :p

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 07, 2009 8:47 am but that doesn't change the fact that these scenes are already in the Director's Cut?

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Tue Apr 07, 2009 9:48 am - Rei 1 seeing Kaworu as she dies

[]: What exactly was cut out of/put into "Death(True)2&quot             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Mon Apr 06, 2009 6:17 pm Quick question probably answered somewhere else but looking for a quick answer: Wikipedia says this: "Death & Rebirth" (Rebirth being the first half of End of Eva) had "Death", a clip show of the series with Director's Cut material they knew they'd cut out and put into episodes 21 through 24. So the "new stuff" in "Death" is those scenes, and the redone "Rei smiling in episode 6" scene Then, "Death(true)" was a satellite TV version that just cut out ALL of the new stuff, utterly worthless It has this to say about the last version: The second edit was Death(true)², which reincorporated the image of Adam on Gendo Ikari's hand, and had several scenes taken out.

The cut of Gendo with Adam is hardly the only "director's cut"-type footage left in TRUE^2. More prominent examples include the camera footage from the UN Antarctic base and Fuyutsuki & Yui's chat at the Ashinoko levee, but you'll find the stuff scattered throughout. Going by the DEATH film book, what was cut out is an Asuka flashback/"mind rape" section between Kaji's death and Kaworu's appearance, including footage such as the monologue at the bathtub, Asuka shoving her boobs in Kaji's face, and "Who are you?" / "No! This isn't me!" scene. The only other difference I've been able to detect from the filmbook is that the shot of Misato flashed during Kensuke's chat with Shinji was redone for TRUE or TRUE^2. Yeah, I know, scans. :p
